homepage.heroSubline: Premium installation and replacement services. Protecting your home against the elements with style and security.
homepage.aboutTitle: Built on Quality, Rooted in San Diego
aboutText: Allure Windows & Doors Inc started with a simple goal: to provide San Diego homeowners with superior window and door solutions. We saw a need for a contractor that combined expert craftsmanship with a commitment to customer satisfaction, and we've been exceeding expectations ever since.

Our approach is straightforward: we listen to your needs, assess your property, and recommend the best products for your specific situation. Whether it's weathering salty air near Coronado or boosting energy efficiency in Escondido, we tailor our services to San Diego's unique challenges.

We're proud to be a part of the San Diego community. We source materials locally whenever possible, support local charities, and are committed to sustainable practices. We build lasting relationships with our clients, ensuring their homes are protected and beautiful for years to come.

valueProps.title: Customer Satisfaction
valueProps.description: Your happiness is our priority. We're committed to providing exceptional service from start to finish.

homepage.ctaSubline: Schedule a free consultation and discover the perfect windows and doors for your San Diego home.

services.name: Window Installation
services.shortDescription: Professional window installation for enhanced energy efficiency and curb appeal.
services.description:
Proper window installation is critical for performance and longevity, especially in San Diego's diverse climate. Our team meticulously installs all types of windows, from classic single-hung to modern sliding styles. We handle everything from precise measurements to secure sealing, ensuring a weather-tight fit that minimizes drafts and maximizes energy savings. We are experienced with the unique challenges of San Diego's housing stock, whether it's retrofitting windows in a historic La Jolla cottage or installing energy-efficient windows in a new construction home in Scripps Ranch. 

Our installation process includes removing old windows, preparing the opening, installing the new window according to manufacturer specifications, and finishing with professional caulking and trim work. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring a seamless and aesthetically pleasing result. With Allure Windows & Doors Inc, you can trust that your new windows will not only look beautiful but also provide lasting protection against the elements and improve your home's overall value.

We also offer window replacement services, upgrading outdated or damaged windows with modern, energy-efficient models. Our team can help you choose the right windows for your home's style and budget, considering factors such as energy efficiency, noise reduction, and security.

faq.question: How long does window installation take?
faq.answer: The duration depends on the number of windows and the complexity of the project. We'll provide a detailed timeline during the consultation.

faq.question: What type of windows are best for San Diego's climate?
faq.answer: Energy-efficient windows with low-E coatings are ideal for reducing heat gain and blocking harmful UV rays.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty on your window installations?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a comprehensive warranty on both the windows and our installation services, providing peace of mind.

services.name: Door Installation
services.shortDescription: Secure and stylish door installation for entryways, patios, and more.
services.description:
A well-installed door not only enhances your home's curb appeal but also provides security and energy efficiency. Allure Windows & Doors Inc specializes in the installation of all types of doors, including entry doors, patio doors, sliding doors, and French doors. We understand the importance of proper installation to ensure a weathertight seal and smooth operation. Our team is experienced in working with a variety of materials, from wood and fiberglass to steel and composite. 

We pay close attention to detail during every step of the installation process, from preparing the opening to installing the door and hardware. We ensure that the door is properly aligned and sealed to prevent drafts and leaks. We also offer door replacement services, upgrading outdated or damaged doors with modern, energy-efficient models. Whether you're looking to replace a worn-out front door or install a new sliding glass door to your patio, we have the expertise to get the job done right. 

In San Diego, coastal properties require doors that can withstand salt air corrosion. We offer a range of durable, weather-resistant doors designed to withstand the harsh coastal environment. We also offer security upgrades, such as reinforced frames and multi-point locking systems, to protect your home from intruders.
process: Step 3: Old Door Removal & Frame Preparation

faq.question: What type of door is best for a coastal home in San Diego?
faq.answer: Fiberglass or composite doors are excellent choices due to their resistance to salt air corrosion and moisture damage.

faq.question: How long does door installation take?
faq.answer: Typically, a standard door installation takes one day. More complex installations may require additional time.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty on your door installations?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a warranty on both the door and the installation, ensuring your satisfaction.

services.name: Window Replacement
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your home with energy-efficient window replacements.
services.description:
Replacing old or damaged windows can significantly improve your home's energy efficiency, comfort, and value. Allure Windows & Doors Inc offers a wide selection of replacement windows to suit any style and budget. We can help you choose the right windows for your home, considering factors such as energy efficiency, noise reduction, and aesthetics. Our team is experienced in replacing all types of windows, including single-hung, double-hung, casement, and sliding windows. 

We understand the challenges of window replacement in San Diego's older homes, such as dealing with uneven openings and outdated framing. Our team has the expertise to overcome these challenges and ensure a seamless and professional installation. We also offer energy-efficient window options that can help you save money on your energy bills. With our low-E coatings and insulated frames, you can reduce heat gain in the summer and heat loss in the winter. 

Whether you're looking to replace a single broken window or upgrade all the windows in your home, Allure Windows & Doors Inc is here to help. We offer free consultations and estimates, and we're committed to providing exceptional service from start to finish. Old windows can cause drafts and increased energy bills. Replacing them with modern, energy-efficient models can dramatically improve comfort and savings.
process: Step 3: Careful Removal of Existing Windows

faq.question: How do I know if I need to replace my windows?
faq.answer: Signs include drafts, condensation between the panes, difficulty opening or closing, and rotting frames.

faq.question: What are the benefits of energy-efficient windows?
faq.answer: Energy-efficient windows can reduce heat gain in the summer and heat loss in the winter, lowering your energy bills and improving your home's comfort.

faq.question: Do you offer financing options for window replacement?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer flexible financing options to help you make your home improvement dreams a reality.

services.name: Patio Door Installation
services.shortDescription: Seamless patio door installation to connect your indoor and outdoor spaces.
services.description:
Create a seamless transition between your indoor and outdoor living spaces with a professionally installed patio door. Allure Windows & Doors Inc specializes in the installation of all types of patio doors, including sliding glass doors, French doors, and bi-fold doors. We understand the importance of proper installation to ensure smooth operation, energy efficiency, and security. Our team is experienced in working with a variety of materials, from vinyl and aluminum to wood and fiberglass. 

We pay close attention to detail during every step of the installation process, from preparing the opening to installing the door and hardware. We ensure that the door is properly aligned and sealed to prevent drafts and leaks. We also offer patio door replacement services, upgrading outdated or damaged doors with modern, energy-efficient models. A new patio door is a great way to freshen up a home. 

Whether you're looking to create a spacious entertaining area or simply enjoy the view from your backyard, Allure Windows & Doors Inc can help you choose the perfect patio door for your home. We offer free consultations and estimates, and we're committed to providing exceptional service from start to finish.
process: Step 3: Careful Removal of Existing Door

faq.question: What type of patio door is best for maximizing natural light?
faq.answer: Sliding glass doors are a great option for maximizing natural light due to their large glass panels.

faq.question: How do I choose the right patio door for my home?
faq.answer: Consider factors such as your home's style, budget, and energy efficiency needs. We can help you choose the perfect patio door for your home.

faq.question: Do you offer security upgrades for patio doors?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer security upgrades such as reinforced frames, multi-point locking systems, and shatter-resistant glass.

services.name: French Door Installation
services.shortDescription: Elegant French door installation for a touch of classic style.
services.description:
Add a touch of elegance and sophistication to your home with a professionally installed French door. Allure Windows & Doors Inc specializes in the installation of French doors, both interior and exterior. We understand the importance of proper installation to ensure smooth operation, energy efficiency, and security. Our team is experienced in working with a variety of materials, from wood and fiberglass to steel and composite. 

We pay close attention to detail during every step of the installation process, from preparing the opening to installing the door and hardware. We ensure that the door is properly aligned and sealed to prevent drafts and leaks. We also offer French door replacement services, upgrading outdated or damaged doors with modern, energy-efficient models. French doors are a stylish way to increase home value. 

Whether you're looking to create a grand entrance or add a touch of charm to your patio, Allure Windows & Doors Inc can help you choose the perfect French door for your home. We offer free consultations and estimates, and we're committed to providing exceptional service from start to finish.
process: Step 3: Careful Removal of Existing Door

faq.question: What are the benefits of French doors?
faq.answer: French doors offer a timeless aesthetic, increased natural light, and improved ventilation.

faq.question: What materials are French doors typically made of?
faq.answer: French doors are commonly made of wood, fiberglass, steel, or composite materials.

faq.question: Do you offer custom French door designs?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer custom French door designs to match your unique style and preferences.

services.name: Storm Door Installation
services.shortDescription: Protect your entryways with durable and stylish storm doors.
services.description:
Protect your entry doors from the elements with a professionally installed storm door. Allure Windows & Doors Inc specializes in the installation of storm doors, providing an extra layer of security and insulation for your home. We understand the importance of proper installation to ensure smooth operation and weather protection. Our team is experienced in working with a variety of materials, from aluminum and steel to vinyl and wood. 

We pay close attention to detail during every step of the installation process, from preparing the opening to installing the door and hardware. We ensure that the door is properly aligned and sealed to prevent drafts and leaks. We also offer storm door replacement services, upgrading outdated or damaged doors with modern, energy-efficient models. A storm door can help to protect your home from heavy rain. 

Whether you're looking to protect your entry door from the elements or add an extra layer of security to your home, Allure Windows & Doors Inc can help you choose the perfect storm door for your needs. We offer free consultations and estimates, and we're committed to providing exceptional service from start to finish.
process: Step 3: Careful Removal of Existing Door

faq.question: What are the benefits of installing a storm door?
faq.answer: Storm doors provide weather protection, increase security, improve energy efficiency, and extend the lifespan of your entry door.

faq.question: What materials are storm doors typically made of?
faq.answer: Storm doors are commonly made of aluminum, steel, vinyl, or wood.

faq.question: Do you offer different styles of storm doors?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a variety of storm door styles to match your home's architecture and personal preferences.

Allure Windows & Doors Inc. is proud to offer our window and door installation services to the residents of Chula Vista, California. Known for its diverse neighborhoods and family-friendly atmosphere, Chula Vista boasts a significant number of homes built in the 1970s and 1980s, many of which can benefit from energy-efficient window and door upgrades. We understand the specific needs of Chula Vista homeowners and are committed to providing top-quality products and expert installation. 

Our team is experienced in working with a variety of architectural styles common in Chula Vista, ensuring seamless integration and enhanced curb appeal. Whether you're looking to replace outdated windows, improve energy efficiency, or enhance the security of your home, Allure Windows & Doors Inc. is here to help. We offer free consultations and customized solutions to meet your unique budget and requirements.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Allure Windows & Doors did an outstanding job installing new windows in my condo in Pacific Beach. The team was professional, efficient, and the quality of their work is impeccable. My home is noticeably quieter and more comfortable now. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: We had Allure install a new front door and sliding glass door in our Scripps Ranch home. The crew was punctual and completed the work quickly. There was a small issue with the alignment of the sliding door, but they came back the next day and fixed it promptly. Overall, happy with the service.

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: I replaced all the old windows in my 1940s cottage in La Jolla with energy-efficient windows from Allure. The difference is amazing! My house stays cooler in the summer, and I've already noticed a drop in my energy bills. The installation team was very respectful of my home and left everything clean and tidy.

reviews.name: Robert B.
reviews.text: Allure Windows & Doors installed a beautiful new French door leading to our backyard patio. The quality of the door is excellent, and the installation was flawless. It has completely transformed our outdoor living space!

reviews.name: Susan M.
reviews.text: Allure installed a storm door for my home. The installation was quick and easy, and the new door looks great! I recommend!

reviews.name: Michael P.
reviews.text: The team was punctual, professional, and did an excellent job replacing my old windows. My home is now much more energy efficient!
